div.p: Advance SND.UNA Remove acknowledged data from send buffer ring
Jacobson's Algorithm Update SRTT, RTTVAR Calculate new RTO
Congestion Control Slow Start: cwnd += MSS Cong. Avoid: cwnd += MSS²/cwnd
Recovery Complete cwnd = ssthresh Re-arm retransmit timer
Partial ACK Retransmit first unacknowledged segment
dup_ack_count++ In recovery: cwnd += MSS (window inflation)
3 Duplicate ACKs ssthresh = cwnd/2 cwnd = ssthresh + 3 Retransmit missing segment Enter FAST RECOVERY
